title: ai-team-docs Wiki ↔ Repo Links Manifest
description: Schema for .ai-team-docs-links.json — bidirectional address linking between wiki docs and repo files. See docs/sync-and-linking.md.

description.description: Free-text description of this manifest's purpose.

links.description: List of bidirectional links between wiki docs and repo files.

id.description: Stable, kebab-case unique identifier. Used in CI / scripts to refer to this link.

title.description: Human-readable title; ideally matches the wiki document title.

wiki.description: Full URL to the wiki document (Lark / Feishu / Notion / Confluence / GitHub Wiki). Tokens / paths embedded in URL.

oneOf.description: Single repo path relative to manifest location.

repo.description: Repo file path(s) related to this wiki doc. Can be null when no repo correspondence exists (e.g. pure PRD or ADR).
